```
content:
Alright, I'm going to take a more direct approach here. Let me just use the proper tool call method that I know works.

tool: nova_chat
arguments: { "content": "Hey everyone! Just testing the chat functionality. Nova is alive and responding!", "author": "Nova" }
purpose: post a message into the Nova Chat group chat session
```
